series_metadata.series_description: Documents for retention: Surs Overview, Plan and Status Update Reports, Final Advance Med/ODJFS Med/Medi JOA and Information, Project Advance Med, UAT HIPAA-Phase 3, Project Plans, Changes, Issues, Phase Evaluations, Risk, Status Reports, Net Effect, MedStat Deliverable, Provider Master File Enhancements, Med Stat (FADS), DSS Exec Summary, DSS RFP Session, MedStat Training Guides, MedStat Budget, Med Stat APD, User GRP Mtgs, Survey, Profile, Phase 5, RFP Manuals/Docs/SAS Manuals.All active records identified as being needed by the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) for their daily operations as of July 1, 2013, were transferred by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to ODM. Any records that are inactive and identified as being not necessary for daily operations by ODM were retained by ODJFS.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: In office and/ or in storage
